title: Mellow Mustardy Slovakian Pumpkin Dumplings
description: Tender pumpkin dumplings infused with the warmth of mustard, perfect for a festive Slovakian dish, this recipe is low-glycemic-friendly and delightful to eat.

ingredients.name: pumpkin puree
ingredients.notes: canned or fresh, cooked and mashed

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine pumpkin puree, whole wheat flour, eggs, mustard, salt, and black pepper, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into smaller pieces, about the size of a small egg, and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape, making sure the edges are sealed.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer.
Gently add the dumplings to the pot, making sure they are not crowded, and cook for about 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon, and serve hot with melted butter and a dollop of sour cream, if desired.
Traditional Slovakian dishes often include a side of fried onions or bacon, which can be added on top for extra flavor.
